description_long: This is a softcover book with a trifold design, featuring a combination of brown and black panels. The front cover displays a minimalist white graphic of an elephant, while the rest of the cover is filled with dense, small white text blocks. The book appears to be made of standard paper or light cardboard, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The interior includes both text and simple line diagrams, suggesting it may be an instructional or informational booklet. The overall appearance is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on clear communication rather than decorative elements.
description: A trifold, softcover book with brown and black panels, white text, and a minimalist elephant graphic on the front.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing the front and back covers with dense white text and the elephant graphic on the rightmost panel.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, highlighting the thickness and the trifold structure, with the front cover text and graphic visible.
description_view_2: The book is partially open, revealing both the interior text and diagrams, as well as the exterior cover design.
description_view_3: The book is seen edge-on, emphasizing the trifold panels and the alignment of the covers, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: A minimalist white silhouette of an elephant is featured on the front cover, rendered in a simple, modern style. There are no other prominent illustrations or decorative elements.
attribute_title_text: SISTEMA PARA REINTEGRACIÓN DE DESHECHOS CAMINOS
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with white vertical text, matching the minimalist style of the cover. No decorative elements are visible.
